hooks.command: uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/claude_rules_hook.py" session-start
uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/claude_rules_hook.py" post-tool-use
